python -c 
import urllib.request, http.cookiejar

# Use cookie jar to handle any session cookies
cj = http.cookiejar.CookieJar()
opener = urllib.request.build_opener(urllib.request.HTTPCookieProcessor(cj))

# First, get the article page to establish session
article_url = 'https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC2669973/'
req1 = urllib.request.Request(article_url, headers={
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36',
    'Accept': 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8',
    'Accept-Language': 'en-US,en;q=0.5',
    'Referer': 'https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/',
})

with opener.open(req1, timeout=30) as resp:
    _ = resp.read()
    print(f'Got article page, cookies: {list(cj)}')

# Now try the PDF
pdf_url = 'https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC2669973/pdf/tjp0587-0819.pdf'
req2 = urllib.request.Request(pdf_url, headers={
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36',
    'Accept': 'application/pdf,*/*',
    'Referer': article_url,
})

with opener.open(req2, timeout=60) as resp:
    data = resp.read(200)
    ct = resp.headers.get('Content-Type','')
    print(f'PDF response: {resp.status}, CT: {ct}, First bytes: {data[:8]}')
    print(f'Is PDF: {data[:4] == b"%PDF"}')
    if data[:4] == b'%PDF':
        with opener.open(req2, timeout=60) as resp2:
            full_data = resp2.read()
        with open('tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1113_jphysiol.2008.161240/files/chen_2009_dsgc-tuning.pdf', 'wb') as f:
            f.write(full_data)
        print(f'Saved! Size: {len(full_data):,} bytes')
